lesson_title: Prompt Engineering Mastery Comprehensive Course Interview Suite

junior.question: Explain the difference between Zero-Shot, Few-Shot, and Chain-of-Thought prompting.
junior.preparation_guide: Define each pattern and explain when to use each based on task complexity.
junior.explanation: Zero-Shot asks directly without examples; Few-Shot provides demonstration pairs; Chain-of-Thought guides intermediate reasoning steps.
junior.star_framework_tip: Provide a quick concrete example for each prompting style.
common_pitfalls: Confusing Few-Shot examples with system instructions

mid_level.question: How do you build an automated prompt regression testing pipeline using LLM-as-a-Judge?
mid_level.core_intent: Tests prompt evaluation engineering and CI integration.
mid_level.preparation_guide: Discuss golden test datasets, pairwise evaluation, assertion rubrics, and CI/CD pipeline integration.
mid_level.explanation: Automated evaluation pipelines run test inputs through prompt templates and evaluate outputs against rubrics using an evaluation LLM to prevent regression.
mid_level.star_framework_tip: Detail dataset curation, rubric design, and passing score thresholds.
common_pitfalls: Relying on subjective human evaluation for every prompt iteration

senior.question: Architect an enterprise Agentic Multi-Model Routing & Guardrail Gateway handling 50,000 requests/minute with dynamic cost and latency optimization.
senior.core_intent: Evaluates senior AI platform architecture and production LLM gateways.
senior.preparation_guide: Detail semantic caching, prompt prefix caching, model routing matrices (SLM vs LLM), Llama Guard security nodes, and fallback circuits.
senior.explanation: Enterprise LLM gateways intercept requests, enforce input/output security guardrails, leverage semantic caches for instant responses, and route queries dynamically to optimize cost and latency.
senior.star_framework_tip: Draw the gateway architecture diagram, show token metrics, and explain failover mechanisms.
common_pitfalls: Directly exposing raw LLM endpoints to client applications without gateway governance
